app.name: Pay Guard
app.description: Helps you decide where to send limited funds when you have many obligations.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: The app failed to load. Try refreshing the page.
errors.notFoundHint: This link does not exist or has moved.

chat.welcome:
Hi! I'm Pay Guard — your payment prioritization assistant.

Tell me about your situation. You can type or use the microphone. I'll ask step by step about debts, income, and available funds.
chat.subtitle: Conversation with Pay Guard
chat.voiceUnsupported: Voice is not supported in this browser
chat.recommendationReady: I have enough info — ready to recommend.
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.offlineError: You are offline. AI chat requires internet — your last recommendation is available offline.
chat.emptySubtitle: I'll help you prioritize payments. Type or speak — I'll ask about debts, income, and available funds.
chat.voiceHint: Or use the microphone for voice input
suggestions: I have trouble with rent and utilities
I don't know what to pay first

consent.title: AI chat data processing
consent.description: Pay Guard uses xAI (Grok) for conversational advice. Your messages and financial details (income, debts, amounts) will be sent to xAI servers outside the EU to generate replies.
consent.details: Chat advice is not legal or tax advice. You can withdraw consent by signing out. Optional debt notes are not sent to the AI.
consent.accept: I agree and want to continue

consultations.title: My consultations
consultations.subtitle: Previous chats and payment recommendations
consultations.empty: You don't have any saved consultations yet.
consultations.loadError: Could not load conversations. Please try again.
consultations.anonymousHint: Without signing in, consultations are stored only in this browser. They sync to the cloud after login.

footer.disclaimer: Pay Guard does not replace a financial or legal advisor. Recommendations are indicative.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your Pay Guard consultation
auth.emailCodeHint: Existing accounts only. Register first via the Password tab.
auth.emailCodeSent: We sent a code to your email. Enter it below.
auth.emailCodeDevHint: Codes work only for registered emails. Create an account on the Password tab first (e.g. Password1).
auth.passwordRequirementsHint: At least 8 characters with upper, lower case and a digit (e.g. Password1).
auth.confirmEmail: Confirm your email using the link we sent.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: We'll email you a link to set a new password
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If an account exists, we sent a reset link to your email.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Run npm run dev and check your connection.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordRequirements: Password needs 8+ chars with upper, lower case and a digit (e.g. Password1).
errors.accountNotFound: No account for this email. Register first on the Password tab.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Check your inbox or disable Confirm email in Supabase.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.supabaseEmailRateLimited: Supabase temporarily blocks sending emails (testing limit). Use the Password tab with e.g. Password1, or wait about an hour. In Supabase: Authentication → Rate Limits.
errors.pkceHint: The email link doesn't work in this browser. Use the "Email code" tab and enter the 6-digit code, or sign in with password.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.subtitle: You are offline, but your latest data is still available.
offline.bannerSubtitle: View your last recommendations and conversation without a connection.
offline.noRecommendation: No saved recommendation yet. Get a new one when you are back online.
offline.fallbackBody: Open the installed Pay Guard app for your last recommendation.

install.bannerBody: Add the app to your home screen for quick access and offline data.
install.iosBannerBody: Add Pay Guard to your home screen — offline data stays available.
install.iosStepsSubtitle: Pay Guard works like a native app in Safari.
install.iosStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"

settings.title: App settings
settings.subtitle: PWA, offline mode, and installation
settings.installBody: Install Pay Guard as an app for faster access and a better offline experience.
settings.iosInstructions: In Safari, tap Share (□↑) and choose “Add to Home Screen”.
settings.installedMessage: Pay Guard is installed on your device.
settings.offlineBody: Your last recommendation and conversation are stored locally for offline viewing.
settings.aboutBody: Pay Guard is a Progressive Web App (PWA). It works in the browser and when installed on your home screen.
